text: The sales comparison approach was given primary weight in the reconciliation, as it reflects recent transactions of comparable retail/service properties located in competing rural communities within Central Illinois and directly mirrors the actions of typical buyers and sellers in this market segment. Market research identified relevant comparable sales and rental data for retail/service commercial properties within Danvers and the broader McLean County market area. The sales comparison approach analyzed physical, locational, and economic similarities and differences between the subject property and selected comparables, with appropriate adjustments made to reflect site size, building area, age/condition, and market exposure. This approach is most applicable to an owner-user or local investor decision-making process and is considered the most reliable indicator of market value for the subject.
